subject: LU-18813 osd-wbcfs: add a simple mount test to conf-sanity.sh

This isn't using osd-wbcfs in Maloo. And osd-wbcfs doesn't load on RHEL7 (for Janitor).

This change cannot be cherry-picked to master.
Please rebase the change locally and upload the rebased commit for review.

Looks good to me.

Abandoned

I'm going to create my own CI to test osd-wbcfs per-patch.

commit.subject: LU-18813 osd-wbcfs: add a simple mount test to conf-sanity.sh
commit.message:
LU-18813 osd-wbcfs: add a simple mount test to conf-sanity.sh

Add a simple mount test as conf-sanity/0a to validate that
osd-wbcfs can still be mounted.

Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I7e76bce4ceb353c0fcacd037b34066e360979c53
